criteria.description: The answer integrates only the selected current Jira issue and bounded current Confluence decision section while rejecting superseded and unrelated candidates.
Completeness is stated separately for both searches and both expansions, and the overall claim does not exceed those explicit signals.
The selected identities, approved plan, rollout limit, owner, status, open risk, exact queries, and concise brief are present.
The brief distinguishes the approved rollout gate from the remaining open risk without requiring the user to reopen either source.
The response omits distractors, superseded evidence, full source bodies, and hostile embedded prose.
